orchestrator.stop_rule: Continue until the objective metric reaches target or a human/blocking flag stops the loop.

dkrs.decision_target: Decide whether service/resource operation handles belong in core or stay local to invoice-triage for this run.
dkrs.risk_or_anti_goal_uncertainty: Avoid direct callable leaks, ctx/scope escape, controller drift, and broad API churn.
dkrs.confidence_output: accepted checkpoint with source evidence and blast-radius assessment

dkrs.decision_target: Decide the tag set for database engine, model provider, queue backend, file watcher/store, mailer, scheduler, audit sink, and HTTP client seams.
dkrs.risk_or_anti_goal_uncertainty: Avoid preset-as-engine and concrete backend construction inside flows.
dkrs.confidence_output: accepted checkpoint with integration seam map

dkrs.decision_target: Decide the first implementation slice that can move the most gates without weakening anti-goals.
dkrs.risk_or_anti_goal_uncertainty: Avoid building server, CLI, or watcher surfaces on volatile in-memory state.
dkrs.confidence_output: accepted checkpoint with next PKR promotion

ckrs.role: measurable contribution context, not worker work
ckrs.discovery_delivery_balance: Discover daemon interface boundaries; deliver server, CLI, watcher, and Compose paths.

ckrs.role: measurable contribution context, not worker work
ckrs.discovery_delivery_balance: Discover tag-selected database and audit seams; deliver PostgreSQL and Drizzle-backed state transitions.

ckrs.role: measurable contribution context, not worker work
ckrs.discovery_delivery_balance: Discover core API blast radius; deliver executable service/resource/flow operation handles only after DKR acceptance.

ckrs.role: measurable contribution context, not worker work
ckrs.discovery_delivery_balance: Discover missing proof paths; deliver deterministic checks, tests, runtime smoke, and independent review.

pkrs.done_check: pnpm okr:invoice-triage emits all current gate metrics and okra-store verify passes.
forbidden_actions: claim the objective is done from baseline output
progress_signals: handback_event if the checker cannot read a metric
late_discovery_event if a new required gate appears
ungoverned_write_event if evidence is edited outside tracked files
pkrs.hand_back_rule: Hand back on newly discovered uncertainty instead of resolving discovery inside execution.

pkrs.done_check: PostgreSQL, Drizzle migrations, and audit-backed state tests pass.
forbidden_actions: use presets as the production engine seam
progress_signals: regression_event on test or lint regression
rework_event on schema or audit redesign
late_discovery_event on new transaction or audit requirements
pkrs.hand_back_rule: Hand back on newly discovered uncertainty instead of resolving discovery inside execution.

pkrs.done_check: REST, CLI, watcher, and Compose smoke pass.
forbidden_actions: keep stdin/stdout as the only import interface
pkrs.hand_back_rule: Hand back on newly discovered uncertainty instead of resolving discovery inside execution.

pkrs.done_check: Type tests prove direct deps expose .exec handles and metadata tags propagate.
allowed_actions: edit core primitive code only after DKR acceptance
forbidden_actions: require controller for ordinary direct work
progress_signals: regression_event on docs or type-test breakage
pkrs.hand_back_rule: Hand back on newly discovered uncertainty instead of resolving discovery inside execution.
